name: Modular Desk Organizer
desc: A snap-together desk organizer for pens, cards and cables. Configure the modules to fit your setup.

name: Cable Management Clip Set
desc: A set of adhesive-backed clips that keep charging and desk cables tidy and in place.

name: Geometric Planter
desc: A faceted planter with a drainage insert — great for succulents and small indoor plants.

name: Layered Wall Art Piece
desc: A multi-layer geometric wall panel that adds depth and a modern accent to any room.

name: Gaming Dice Tray
desc: A felt-free rolling tray with raised edges — keeps your dice on the table, not the floor.

name: Custom Name Keychain
desc: Personalize with any name, word or small logo. A quick, affordable custom gift.

name: Adjustable Phone Stand
desc: A sturdy multi-angle stand for phones and small tablets — folds flat to travel.

name: Business Card Holder
desc: A clean desk-top card holder that keeps your business cards presentable and within reach.

name: Custom 3D Print (Made to Order)
desc: Upload your own file and we'll print it to order in your chosen material and color.
